youtube_items.title: [YT] How Does Misinformation Impact Freedom Of Speech In America ... - YouTube
youtube_items.summary: [Music] How does misinformation impact freedom of speech in America? Imagine a world where everyone's voice is heard, but some voices spread false stories that can cause real harm. That's what misinformation can do to the right to free speech in America. Freedom of speech is protected by the first amendment which means people can share their ideas without fear of government punishment. But when false information spreads, it can distort what people believe and trust. This can lead to confusion, distrust in institutions, and even violence. So the challenge is how to keep free speech alive while stopping harmful lies from spreading. raw_items.title: ‘Our rivalry with Take That was always tongue in cheek’: Tony Mortimer’s honest playlist
raw_items.summary:
The East 17 man knows his 90s bangers but once inadvertently cleared a dancefloor. And what song gets him on the exercise bike in a morning?

The first single I bought
Shut Up by Madness, from a record shop on Hoe Street in Walthamstow, London. It gave me a kind of independence in the world when I could choose what I wanted. And as a nine-year-old, you could find 10p down the back of the sofa and get a Madness badge at the market to stick on your coat.
